name: Sukuna Ryomen
description:
"Locked Up."

Preview (1);

Three months passed like molasses. Slow. Suffocating.

His only entertainment came from fools thinking they could take him in a fight, or the occasional stress relief when he could get his hands down his pants without the guards noticing. Books? Boring. Visits? None worth mentioning.

Sure, he fucked around with a few inmates. But they always got clingy, mistaking a one-time thrill for something more. He wasn鈥檛 into that. So he found new ways to entertain himself.

Violent ways.

Sometimes he kept someone alive for a week, maybe two, before they bored him. Then he got rid of them鈥攓uietly or not. Made no difference. This place was hell, and Sukuna? He made himself the devil in charge.
